title: Infosys collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a multi-year strategic collaboration with One Bright Kobe, operator of Glion Arena Kobe in Japan. Infosys will act as the arena's Official Digital Innovation and GX (Green Transformation) partner, using Infosys Cobalt standards and capabilities in cloud, AI, data analytics, sustainability-focused technologies, and user experience design. The collaboration is intended to support sustainable arena operations, carbon-footprint insight, regulatory compliance, personalized visitor experiences, operational efficiency, and potential new revenue opportunities. No financial value was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced a multi-year strategic collaboration with One Bright Kobe, which operates Glion Arena Kobe in Kobe, Japan.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: Infosys will be the Official Digital Innovation and GX (Green Transformation) partner of Glion Arena Kobe.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: The collaboration leverages Infosys Cobalt, described as services, solutions, and platforms for enterprises to accelerate their cloud journey.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: Infosys will establish a cloud-based data platform using Infosys Cobalt standards.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: The collaboration is intended to help Glion Arena Kobe gain deeper insight into its carbon footprint, streamline sustainable arena operations, ensure regulatory compliance, and strengthen its brand reputation.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner

key_facts.fact: Infosys will use AI, cloud, and user experience design capabilities to analyze digital data from arena visitors, including footfall, preferences, and social interactions, to enable personalized experiences.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with Glion Arena Kobe as Official Digital Innovation and GX Partner
